Title: Luminae Rose & Argan Body Oil
Body (HTML):
Sink into softness.

Our Rose & Argan Body Oil is a lightweight, fast-absorbing dry oil that wraps your skin in deep nourishment. Pressed from cold-extracted argan kernels and infused with Bulgarian rose, it leaves skin luminous, supple, and gently scented — without the greasy feeling.

Ideal for post-shower rituals or a calming evening wind-down. Free from parabens, sulphates, and synthetic fragrance.

  • Cold-extracted argan oil
  • Bulgarian rose infusion
  • Fast-absorbing dry-oil formula
  • Paraben & sulphate-free
  • Suitable for all skin types

How to use: Apply 4–6 drops to damp skin after showering. Massage gently in circular motions until absorbed.
Product Category: Health & Beauty > Personal Care > Cosmetics > Skin Care

Title: Luminae Himalayan Salt & Coconut Body Scrub
Body (HTML):
Your skin deserves a fresh start.

This Himalayan Salt & Coconut Body Scrub gently buffs away dullness using natural pink salt granules blended with cold-pressed coconut oil and a hint of vanilla. Each use leaves skin visibly smoother, softened, and lightly moisturised — no rinse-residue, no artificial dyes.

A weekly ritual your skin will thank you for. Suitable for all skin types.

  • Natural Himalayan pink salt granules
  • Cold-pressed coconut oil base
  • Vanilla & essential oil scent
  • No artificial dyes or synthetic fragrance
  • Suitable for all skin types

How to use: Apply to wet skin in the shower. Massage in circular motions, focusing on rough areas. Rinse thoroughly. Use 2–3 times per week.
Product Category: Health & Beauty > Personal Care > Cosmetics > Skin Care

Title: Luminae Goat Milk & Honey Artisan Soap Bar
Body (HTML):
Crafted in small batches, made for daily luxury.

Our Goat Milk & Honey Artisan Soap Bar is a daily luxury for your skin. Rich in lactic acid from pure goat milk and humectant raw honey, this gentle cold-process bar cleanses without stripping your skin's natural moisture barrier.

Lightly scented with oat and vanilla, it transforms your morning shower into a calm, grounding ritual. Completely cruelty-free and biodegradable packaging.

  • Cold-process handcrafted formula
  • Pure goat milk & raw honey
  • Available in 3 scents
  • Cruelty-free & biodegradable packaging
  • Net weight: 110g per bar

How to use: Lather between palms or directly on skin. Rinse thoroughly. Keep dry between uses to extend bar life.
Product Category: Health & Beauty > Personal Care > Cosmetics > Skin Care
Tags: soap, artisan, goat-milk, honey, cold-process, gifting

Title: Luminae Soy Wax Ritual Candle
Body (HTML):
Set the mood in minutes.

Our hand-poured Soy Wax Ritual Candle uses 100% natural soy wax and a cotton wick for a clean, long-lasting burn of up to 45 hours. Each scent is crafted to anchor a mood — light Sandalwood & Amber for evenings of calm, or choose Jasmine & Neroli for a floral, energising glow.

Free from synthetic dyes and petroleum. Every candle comes in a reusable ceramic vessel you'll want to keep long after the wax is gone.

  • 100% natural soy wax
  • Cotton wick — clean, soot-free burn
  • Up to 45 hours burn time
  • Reusable ceramic vessel
  • No synthetic dyes or petroleum

How to use: Trim wick to 5mm before each burn. Allow wax to pool fully on first use. Never burn for more than 4 hours at a time.
Tags: candle, soy-wax, hand-poured, home-decor, gifting, bestseller
Image Alt Text: Luminae Soy Wax Ritual Candle sandalwood amber in ceramic vessel

Title: Luminae Botanical Reed Diffuser
Body (HTML):
Fragrance that lasts for weeks, not hours.

The Luminae Botanical Reed Diffuser slowly releases your chosen scent through 8 natural rattan reeds, filling your space with a consistent, sophisticated aroma for up to 60 days. No heat, no electricity — just pure botanical oils working quietly in the background.

Packaged in a hand-painted glass bottle that doubles as a home accent piece. Refill bottles sold separately.

  • 8 natural rattan reeds included
  • Up to 60 days of fragrance
  • 100% pure botanical oils
  • Hand-painted glass bottle
  • No heat or electricity required

How to use: Insert reeds into the bottle. Flip reeds every 3–4 days for stronger scent. Keep away from direct sunlight.
Tags: diffuser, reed, home-fragrance, botanical, natural, home-decor
